title: Biggest rule I've learnt so far:
body: Your privacy is your peace. Stop comparing yourself to others. The others who are loud about it. You never know what people are constantly trying to prove to other people. You never know what external validation people are looking for.

title: The same niggas calling me gay as an insult are the same niggas who's girls be tryna sleep with me 🤣🤣🤣 I'm sorry for laughing this hard
study why successful people cut off their family
don't let internet losers judge you for the process
Rihanna launching Fenty w/ LVMH is symbolic of a seismic shift in how we view, sustain, and rewrite the canons of European prestige and history.
body: We must understand the need to embrace new, global definitions of what constitutes prestige, history, and luxury 💚 — via @YOON_AMBUSH
